responses.s0_q0: Partially, Notices are not provided in all required languages.
responses.s0_q1: No, the notice lacks itemization and purpose details: The notice does not provide an itemized list or specify the purposes for data use.
responses.s0_q2: Not applicable: This option might apply if consent is not required due to exemptions (e.g., legal obligations).
responses.s0_q4: Not applicable: This option might apply if your organization does not handle data under consent exemptions or if such exemptions are not relevant to your operations.
responses.s0_q3: No, processing often exceeds specified purposes: The organization frequently processes personal data for purposes not specified in the notice.
